summary: Completed testing of CPC Excel Download and Dispatch Lots with forecast_id features. All 9 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Download Excel button visible and working in CPC Demand Forecasts tab.
seed_data_creation: Test dispatch lots created during testing: DL_202603_0008 (with forecast_id), DL_202603_0009, DL_202603_0010, DL_202603_0011, DL_202603_0012. All linked to test forecasts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CPC Excel Download and Dispatch Lots with forecast_id features fully tested. Excel download returns valid .xlsx file with 14 columns (Forecast ID, Buyer Code, Buyer Name, Vertical, Brand, Model, SKU ID, SKU Description, Forecast Month, Forecast Qty, Scheduled Qty, Remaining Qty, Priority, Status). Dispatch lots multi endpoint correctly saves forecast_id at both lot level and line item level.

dispatch_lots_with_forecast_id.POST /api/dispatch-lots/multi with forec: PASS - Saves forecast_id at lot level
dispatch_lots_with_forecast_id.line_level_forecast_id: PASS - Saves forecast_id at line item level

cpc_demand_forecasts_api.GET /api/cpc/demand-forecasts: PASS - Returns forecasts with dispatch_lots array

frontend_ui.download_button_visible: PASS - Download Excel button visible in Demand Forecasts tab
frontend_ui.button_text: PASS - Shows 'Download Excel' with download icon
frontend_ui.forecast_table: PASS - Shows all columns including Dispatch Lots
frontend_ui.dispatch_lots_linked: PASS - Shows linked dispatch lot codes (e.g., DL_202603_0002, DL_202603_0003)
